calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for David Schaaf (Executor).

The Court raised the issues with regard to the waiver of accounting and who are the beneficiaries. Mr. Boessenecker explained that the beneficiary is the Estate in New Jersey and that the New Jersey Court had ordered the transfer of real property to the estate in New Jersey. The Court questioned if the fees can be avoided if the real property is transfer into the trust rather than the estate and what about income from the property. Mr. Boessenecker stated he was informed by the client and the attorney in New Jersey of the Order to transfer the property into the New Jersey estate but he is not sure if it is a verbal or written order. He further stated that the income from the property is under $50,000.00 and it is not subject to the jurisdiction of the court and that he has filed waiver of accounting by the beneficiary and the co-trustees of the trust. The Court took matter under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)
